name: Captrix editor core flow
description: Verifies the first Captrix AI editor slice: page load, caption editing, local AI coach, style controls, and export guard.

planSteps.description: The Captrix AI editor loads, the main heading contains 'Make captions move.', and data-testid=project-status, data-testid=platform-instagram-reels, data-testid=platform-youtube-video, data-testid=video-input, data-testid=generate-captions, data-testid=transcription-status, data-testid=caption-input, data-testid=style-creator, data-testid=position-bottom, and data-testid=export-kit are visible.
Replace data-testid=caption-input with 'Launch clips faster with styled captions.'.
data-testid=caption-overlay updates with 'Launch clips faster with styled captions.'.
Click data-testid=style-karaoke, move data-testid=caption-size to a larger value, then click data-testid=position-bottom.
The active style metric shows Karaoke and the resized caption remains visible on the video stage.
The platform guidance and format metric update after each preset change, and the caption remains visible.
data-testid=generate-captions is visible and data-testid=transcription-status explains that captions are generated locally without requiring a server API key.
The caption textarea changes, a success message mentions the local caption AI suggestion, and data-testid=ai-score plus data-testid=ai-summary are visible.
Click data-testid=reset-studio, then click data-testid=export-kit without uploading a video.
The app prevents export and shows that a valid clip is required before exporting.
